visual_cues: Welcome to a simple and fast application text
yellow Reset + Apply buttons at bottom
Keep screen ON while recording toggle
Show rename dialog after recording toggle
resource_hints: Show rename dialog after recording is completed

visual_cues: list of files or 'Records is empty'

states.description: System Recent picker with filter chips

strategies.name: INITIAL_LAUNCH_AND_SETUP
strategies.preconditions: first time opening the app from home_screen
steps: modify desired options on setup_screen (Theme, Naming, Recording format, Sample rate, Bitrate, Channel count)
strategies.success_signal: main_recorder visible with format/sample-rate text reflecting choices
strategies.fallback: if you exit Apply too early, tap gear icon to re-open settings_menu

strategies.name: CONFIGURE_RECORDING_PARAMETERS
steps: tap target bitrate button (only available for compressed formats like M4a)
strategies.success_signal: checkmarks appear on selected buttons; summary text matches request
strategies.fallback: if Bitrate disappears under 3gp/Wav, set bitrate first with M4a then switch format

strategies.name: CHANGE_THEME_OR_NAMING
steps: select desired naming pattern (sequential, date formats, or Unix timestamp)
strategies.success_signal: main_recorder background color matches theme; summary text reflects new naming
strategies.fallback: re-open dropdown if selection didn't register

strategies.name: LOOKUP_INFO_VIA_HELP_ICON
strategies.preconditions: on setup_screen or settings_menu, need recommendation/explanation
steps: tap info (i) icon next to the relevant section
read info_dialog text for 'recommended' marker or specific value
select the recommended value on the underlying screen
strategies.success_signal: answer text present in dialog; selection persists after Ok

strategies.name: READ_EXPECTED_SIZE
steps: ensure desired format/sample rate/bitrate/channel are selected
read the 'X Mb/min expected size' line at the bottom info panel
strategies.success_signal: expected size text visible above Reset/Apply

strategies.name: RECORD_AND_SAVE_WITH_NAME
steps: in rename_dialog, clear field and type desired filename
strategies.success_signal: main_recorder shows saved file name in title area
strategies.fallback: if rename dialog doesn't appear, enable 'Show rename dialog after recording is completed' in settings_menu

strategies.name: BROWSE_RECORDS
steps: tap list icon bottom-right to open records_list
optionally tap sort/filter icon for sort options
optionally tap bookmark icon for bookmarks
strategies.success_signal: Records list or 'Records is empty' visible

strategies.name: ENABLE_KEEP_SCREEN_ON
steps: tap gear icon to open settings_menu

dead_ends.failed_action: looking for built-in search bar / 'Large files' filter inside the app
dead_ends.note: App lacks an explicit search; only sort options exist. 'Large files'/Recent filtering is in the system Recent picker, not the app itself.

dead_ends.failed_action: trying to set bitrate after selecting 3gp or Wav format
dead_ends.note: Bitrate section disappears for non-M4a formats; set bitrate first while M4a is selected, then switch format.

dead_ends.failed_action: tapping Apply before configuring all required parameters
dead_ends.note: Apply exits setup_screen; missing settings must be redone via gear settings_menu.

dead_ends.failed_action: opening Theme dropdown then tapping Apply without selecting
dead_ends.note: Dropdown closes without applying change; theme remains as before. Must reopen and explicitly tap a theme entry.

categories.name: CONFIGURE_SETTINGS
categories.precondition: Target app is installed and reachable; configuration screen or settings menu accessible
abstract_steps: Launch app from launcher or app drawer
For each requested parameter: locate its section and select the desired option
Confirm/apply the changes via the explicit apply/save control
Verify on the resulting screen that selections are reflected
failure_modes: Applying before all parameters are set, exiting the settings page prematurely
Selecting a value that hides dependent options (mutually exclusive choices)
Mis-tapping a dropdown that auto-dismisses without recording a selection
Confusing similar-looking app icons during launch
verification_checklist: Each requested parameter shows the selected state (checkmark/highlight)
Any summary/status line on main UI reflects the new values
Returning to the settings screen still shows the chosen values

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Information is exposed somewhere in the app's UI (info icons, help dialogs, summary lines)
abstract_steps: Navigate to the screen that contains the desired information
If hidden, tap the contextual help/info affordance next to the relevant field
Read the dialog or status text
Return the exact phrasing/value as the answer
failure_modes: Reading default values instead of values for the requested configuration
Closing the info dialog before extracting the value
Confusing 'recommended' marker with currently selected value
verification_checklist: Value is read while the relevant configuration is active
Answer matches text on screen verbatim where requested

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: App is on its main creation surface; storage permission granted
abstract_steps: If prompted, supply a name and confirm save
failure_modes: Save dialog absent because an option to prompt-for-name is disabled
Default name used instead of requested name because dialog dismissed
verification_checklist: New entry appears in the entry list with the desired name
Entry metadata reflects the configured parameters

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Entry list is non-empty and visible
failure_modes: Deleting wrong entry due to mis-tap
verification_checklist: Target entry no longer in list

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: Target screen exists and is reachable from current screen
abstract_steps: Tap to navigate; if blocked by onboarding, dismiss first
Confirm arrival via expected visual cue
failure_modes: Icon confusable with another app or function
Search/filter expected but not present in current app
Back button leaves the app instead of going up one level

categories.name: RESET_TO_DEFAULTS
categories.precondition: On settings screen exposing a reset/restore control
failure_modes: Reset tapped before reading required current values
verification_checklist: All visible options show default selections
